policy.move_rule: Do not move top-level scripts directly. Add subfolder implementations only behind stable wrapper shims and update this inventory first.
policy.delete_rule: obsolete-suspect entries require a focused audit commit before deletion.
policy.package_rule: Root scripts are host-side unless category is runtime-package-needed; APK-bundled runtime scripts live under app/src/main/assets/**/scripts.
policy.compat_wrapper_rule: Future moves keep the existing top-level path as a thin wrapper until all repository references and documented commands are migrated.
policy.first_stage_rule: This inventory records categories and move candidates only; it must not rename or move files by itself.

categories.runtime-package-needed: Needed to stage runtime/APK payloads or otherwise part of packaging flow.
categories.build-developer: Build, setup, fetch, or developer environment helper.
categories.test-verification: Test, smoke, benchmark, contract, or device verification helper.
categories.obsolete-suspect: Unreferenced or weakly referenced candidate; not deleted without audit.

runtime-package-needed.wrapper_policy: keep stable top-level wrapper; Gradle/package callers must be migrated before wrapper removal

build-developer.wrapper_policy: stable entrypoints keep wrappers; developer helpers keep temporary wrappers while docs/CI references migrate

test-verification.wrapper_policy: stable verification entrypoints keep wrappers; helper wrappers remain until test manifests and docs stop referencing top-level paths

generated-maintenance.wrapper_policy: top-level wrapper or symlink shim allowed after docs and generated-artifact references migrate

obsolete-suspect.wrapper_policy: no compatibility wrapper until audit chooses archive-over-delete; prefer deletion over moved wrapper when safe

subtree_entries.role: Device-side runner implementation used by verification manifests and host runner wrappers.

entries.role: Audited obsolete candidate; retained temporarily with replacement command and deletion precondition recorded.

audit.reference_scan: rg found no runtime callers outside script inventory/README/verifier allowlist and the script file itself; pycache-only hits are ignored.
audit.decision: keep as obsolete-suspect for now; do not delete until paired UI self-test and engine-exec-input JSONL device artifacts have fully replaced this ad-hoc repro.
